other_observers: Bill Schmoker, Nick Komar, Nick A. Komar, Elana Komar, and Susan Allerton; Original finder was Susan Allerton. A lot of other birders saw this bird, including Joey Kellner.
specific_location: Right hand feeder of Bill and Kim Fisher's House.
description: Wings about the same length as the tail. Wings and tail is black and a white spot at teh end of the tail. A black bill with the base of the lower mandible red. Rows of green spots on the breast and chin of the bird. A white belly and stripe above and below the eye. A black stripe coming down from the eye. A green back and a brownish-green head.Behaviors: Came into the right feeder at Bill and Kim Fisher's House.Call: Didn't hear it.Plumage: Probably an adult
